nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Python-specific coding style rules extending the common style guide, covering PEP 8 compliance, mandatory type annotations, preference for immutable dataclasses and NamedTuples, and toolchain requirements (black, isort, ruff).

nodes.name: fastapi.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive FastAPI development rules covering project structure, async usage, dependency injection patterns, Pydantic schema design, security practices (CORS, JWT, rate-limiting), and testing with dependency overrides.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Python-specific Claude Code hook configuration guidance, specifying PostToolUse hooks for auto-formatting with black/ruff and type-checking with mypy/pyright after Python file edits.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Python-specific design patterns reference extending the common patterns guide, covering structural typing via Protocol, dataclasses as DTOs, and resource management with context managers and generators.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Python-specific security rules extending the common security guide, covering environment-based secret management with dotenv and static analysis with bandit.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Python-specific testing rules extending the common testing guide, specifying pytest as the framework, coverage reporting via pytest-cov, and test categorization using pytest.mark for unit and integration tests.
